review_notes: Selected as a human-sounding single-speaker US English female voice for short-form narration.
The upstream Piper model card identifies the LJ Speech training dataset as public domain.
The voice repository is MIT-licensed; the local Piper engine is GPL-3.0 and is invoked as a separate CLI process.
Re-review upstream terms before redistributing model or engine files. This record is an operational review, not legal advice.
